bodyText: MiniMax 2.7 & Kimi K2.5 are free on Zo Zo · Pricing About Newsletter Blog Resources Download Get started Brand Download the Zo Pegasus icon set and reference the core brand fonts. BRAND MARKS ⢕⣿⢀⣏⣿⢳⡕⣆⢺⣋⢟ Zo Braille Sigil The Zo braille character sigil, used in text-only contexts like terminal UIs.
